2165230.name: Kart: The Tech Filled Racing Game
2165230.description:
Hop into a multiplayer racing experience like never before!

Features (at time of release, new features coming!!!):

  • Functioning Multiplayer!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

  • Two distinct vehicles, each featuring unique active, passive and ultimate abilities!

    • Passive: Can be utilized at any time without cooldown during the course of a race

    • Active: Tool used to shake up your opponents to gain an edge

    • Ultimate (wip): Powerful tool used to send a message to the race track...

  • No one lap is the same!
2165230.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
